name: Ray Parker Jr.
abstract: Ray Erskine Parker Jr. (born May 1, 1954) is an American singer, guitarist, songwriter, and record producer.

concerts.label: The New York Pops 41st Birthday Gala
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Tom Scott
about_quotes.evidence: Arturo Sandoval, Ray Parker and Michael McDonald did a whole bunch of vocals on one of his tunes.
